title: Regional Strategic Sourcing Lead (ASEAN)
description:
about the company
Our client is a global leader in the electronic manufacturing space, specialising in large scale industrial projects in Singapore and we are looking for a Regional Strategic Sourcing Lead to cover the ASEAN market in driving strategic sourcing initiatives and vendor excellence.

WFH arrangement

Central of Singapore

about the job

  • Direct the creation and execution of specialised sourcing frameworks and compliance protocols across Southeast Asia to ensure all acquisition activities align with international quality and safety benchmarks.
  • Lead the end-to-end life-cycle of vendor partnerships, from establishing rigorous selection criteria and formal bidding cycles to negotiating high-stakes, long-term contracts for mission-critical resources.
  • Take full ownership of the regional procurement budget and KPIs, utilising deep financial analysis to identify cost-saving opportunities and streamline process workflows.
  • Proactively monitor shifting market trends and supply chain vulnerabilities to develop robust mitigation plans that safeguard the organisation against procurement-related risks.
  • Act as a key liaison between global business segments and local stakeholders while managing the professional growth of a regional team of procurement and order fulfilment specialists.


skills and experience required

  • Min. 5 years of experience in senior procurement specifically with a focus on managing diverse markets within the ASEAN region. 
  • Bachelor's degree in any discipline. 
  • Leadership experiences 


To apply online please use the 'apply' function.
(EA: 94C3609/ R1985244)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
